prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `6f473927`.
codex_response:
`6f473927` is now packaged in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6f473927/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6f473927/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6f473927/generator.py#L1). The rule is: take a left-right mirror of the input, remap `0 -> 8` and `2 -> 0`, then concatenate it on the opposite side; whether the original ends up on the left or right is determined by which border column has more red cells. The summary hint was used, not discarded, because it matched all official examples.

The generator builds one-sided red fragments inside a `w - 1` active strip with the opposite border kept blank, using border-rooted walks that are collapsed into row bars with occasional holes. That matches the official family’s narrow left/right-anchored fragment shapes without needing any new DSL primitive or a task-local `helpers.py`.

Validation passed end to end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 6f473927` passed `5/5` official examples, the build produced `1000` examples in [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6f473927/task.json), and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 6f473927` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. Preview artifacts are at [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6f473927/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6f473927/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6f473927/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6f473927/previews/preview_03.png).
